name: Imran
bio: With over 30 years in precision engineering, Mr. Imran founded KEW in 1995 with a vision to deliver world-class engineering solutions. His hands-on leadership and deep technical expertise have shaped the company into a trusted industry name.

name: Arfat Khan
bio: Arfat drives day-to-day operations with a focus on efficiency and quality. He holds an MBA in Operations and has implemented lean manufacturing practices that improved productivity by 40% across all facilities.

name: Aqil Ahmed
bio: Aqil leads our engineering division with deep expertise in CNC machining and precision manufacturing. He has designed over 200 custom components and holds certifications in advanced CAD/CAM systems.

name: Md. Adil
bio: Adil established and runs our ISO-certified quality management system. Her meticulous approach to QC has achieved a defect rate below 0.2%. She's a certified quality auditor with expertise in lean Six Sigma.

name: Mahesh
bio: Mahesh oversees production scheduling and floor operations across all manufacturing units. His expertise in workflow optimization has reduced lead times by 30% while maintaining quality standards.

name: Md. Nayeem
bio: Nayeem has built strong client relationships across Hyderabad and beyond. He manages key accounts and business development, contributing to a 35% growth in client base over the last 4 years.

name: Khwaja Khan
bio: Khwaja is a master CNC operator with expertise in 5-axis machining. He has worked on complex aerospace and automotive components requiring precision to micron levels.

name: Ramachari
bio: Ramachari specializes in structural steel fabrication and welding. He is a certified welding inspector and has overseen fabrication projects for major industrial and infrastructure clients.
